name: Rune Ward
text: You have a deeply personal trinket that can be infused with protective magic. Describe what it is and give it to an ally. While they carry it, they can spend a Hope to reduce incoming damage by 1d8. When the ward is used, it goes dormant until your next rest.

name: Unleash Chaos
text: At the start of a battle, place a number of tokens equal to your Spellcast trait on this card. Spend a Hope and any number of tokens to deal that many d10 magic damage to a target within Far range, marking a Stress for each token spent beyond the first.

name: Get Back Up
text: When you take Severe damage, you can mark a Stress to reduce the severity by one threshold.

name: Whirlwind
text: When you make an attack against a target within Very Close range, you can spend a Hope to hit all targets within that range. Make one attack roll against all of them.

name: Deft Maneuvers
text: Once per rest, mark a Stress to move within Close range of a target without provoking attacks, then make an attack against them with advantage.

name: I See It Coming
text: When you're targeted by an attack made from beyond Melee range, you can mark a Stress to roll a d4 and add its result to your Evasion against the attack.

name: Book of Ava
text: A grimoire of practical incantations: Power Push (Spellcast vs. target to knock back), Tava's Armor (mark Stress to add to Armor Score), and Ice Spike (Spellcast for 1d8+1 magic damage).

name: Book of Illiat
text: A grimoire of subtle magics: Slumber (put a minor adversary to sleep), Telepathy (communicate mind-to-mind), and Voidstrike (Spellcast for 1d6+2 magic damage that pushes a target).

name: Deft Deceiver
text: Spend a Hope to gain advantage on a roll to deceive or trick someone into believing a lie you tell them.

name: Enrapture
text: Make a Spellcast Roll against a target within Close range. On a success, they become temporarily Enraptured, focusing only on you until you make an attack or move out of their sight.

name: Pick and Pull
text: You have advantage on rolls to pick locks, disarm traps, or steal items unnoticed using sleight of hand.

name: Rain of Blades
text: Spend a Hope to conjure throwing blades and target all adversaries within Very Close range. Make a Spellcast Roll against each; on a success, deal d8 magic damage.

name: Gifted Tracker
text: When you spend time tracking a creature, make a Spellcast Roll to learn details about it: its direction, how long ago it passed, its condition, and its number.

name: Vicious Entangle
text: Make a Spellcast Roll against a target within Far range. On a success, roots erupt and deal 1d8+2 magic damage, and the target is temporarily Restrained.

name: Bolt Beacon
text: Spend a Hope to send a bolt of shimmering light at a target within Far range. Make a Spellcast Roll; on a success, deal d8 magic damage and the target is temporarily Vulnerable.

name: Mending Touch
text: Touch a creature and make a Spellcast Roll (13). On a success, clear a Hit Point or a Stress on them. On a roll with Fear, you also mark a Stress.

name: Bare Bones
text: When you choose to wear no armor, your damage thresholds are equal to your level plus 6 (Major) and your level plus 12 (Severe), and you gain a Base Armor Score of 3.

name: I Am Your Shield
text: When an ally within Very Close range would take damage, you can mark a Stress to stand in the way and take the damage instead.
